_comment: Committed null schema for milestone payment schedules (P35), keyed by deal_id + contract_ref. Real schedules live in pipeline/user-context/payment-schedule.local.json (gitignored). A milestone becomes billable when its trigger event lands in the task event log; tools/tasks.py then emits a citation-carrying billable task into the finance lane (tools/finance.py), which drafts the invoice. Nothing is sent without human confirmation (finance_management + invoice_generation gates). Amounts stay null until a real figure is provided (never invented).
_boundary: ORGANIZATIONAL TRACKING, NOT FINANCIAL OR TAX ADVICE. Confirm amounts and timing against the signed contract and review with a CPA before billing.
